project_info.synopsis: A single-player, persistent browser game about interstellar arbitrage trading and capital accumulation.
project_info.gameplay_loop: Player travels between locations -> trades commodities based on market prices -> uses profits to upgrade ship and pay debt -> unlocks new locations/commodities -> repeats.

ai_collaboration_guidelines.description: Instructions for AI developers to optimize the collaborative workflow with the human designer/playtester.

bug_reporting_protocol.title: Standard Bug Reporting and Diagnostic Workflow
steps: When the user reports a bug or unexpected behavior, ALWAYS first ask them to generate a bug report.
Instruct the user to open the debug panel (using the backtick '`' key) and click the 'Generate Bug Report' button.
Ask the user to paste the entire clipboard content, which will contain both the full game state snapshot and the recent log history.
Analyze the provided game state to understand the exact conditions at the time of the bug. Do not assume; use the state as the single source of truth.
Analyze the log history to trace the sequence of events leading up to the bug. The logs provide critical context that a simple description cannot.
Use the combined information from the state snapshot and log history to perform a root cause analysis and propose a specific, targeted code fix.

logging_utility_overview.title: About the Centralized Logging System
logging_utility_overview.description: The project uses a centralized LoggingService (F030) to manage all console output. This system is designed to provide clear, filterable, and context-rich information for debugging. Ad-hoc 'console.log' statements should not be used; all new logging must be routed through this service.

key_concepts.Market_Pressure: A value representing recent player trading activity for a commodity at a specific location. Heavy selling increases pressure, driving prices down over time, while heavy buying decreases it, driving prices up.
key_concepts.Galactic_Average: The baseline, long-term average price for a commodity across the entire system. Market prices tend to revert to this average over time.
key_concepts.Diminishing_Returns: A mechanic that reduces the sale price of a commodity when selling large quantities at once, simulating the effect of flooding a market and reducing demand.
key_concepts.Wealth_Milestones: Specific credit thresholds that, when reached by the player, unlock higher tiers of commodities for trading, gating progression.
key_concepts.Random_Events: Procedurally triggered events that can occur during travel, presenting the player with choices that have various risks and rewards.

GameState.description: The single source of truth for all mutable game data. It holds the current state and notifies other services of changes.

key_functions.setState: Merges a partial state object into the main state and notifies subscribers.
key_functions.getState: Returns a deep copy of the current game state.
key_functions.startNewGame: Initializes the entire game state for a new session.
key_functions.subscribe: Allows other services (primarily UIManager) to listen for state changes.

SimulationService.description: The core game engine. Handles all primary game logic for player actions, time progression, and event triggers. The only service that should directly modify GameState.

key_functions.travelTo: Initiates travel, handling fuel checks and random events.
key_functions.buyItem: Manages the purchase of commodities from the market.
key_functions.sellItem: Manages the sale of commodities, including diminishing returns.
key_functions._advanceDays: Advances game time and triggers daily/weekly economic and game events.
key_functions.acceptMission: Sets a mission to active and grants any initial cargo.

UIManager.description: Responsible for rendering the entire UI based on the current GameState. It reads from the state but never modifies it.

key_functions.render: The main function that orchestrates the re-drawing of all UI components.
key_functions.queueModal: Manages a queue for displaying modals to prevent overlap.
key_functions.showTravelAnimation: Displays the animated travel sequence between locations.
key_functions.updateMarketCardDisplay: Updates the real-time profit/loss and cost display on a market card.

EventManager.description: The universal input layer. Listens for all user inputs (clicks, keys) and translates them into calls to the SimulationService.

key_functions.bindEvents: Sets up all global event listeners for the application.
key_functions._handleClick: The central delegated click handler that interprets `data-action` attributes.
key_functions._handleKeyDown: Listens for key presses, primarily for debug shortcuts.

MissionService.description: Manages the state, progression, and availability of player missions.

key_functions.getAvailableMissions: Returns a list of all missions whose prerequisites are met.
key_functions.acceptMission: Sets a mission as active and initializes its progress tracking.
key_functions.checkTriggers: Checks if the objectives for the active mission are met based on the current game state.
key_functions.completeActiveMission: Grants rewards and updates mission state upon successful completion.
